posts.title: They indicted Russians they never expected to show up for trial. Most of them didn’t, but one Russian company hired US counsel , completely embarrassed Mueller‘s office, and ultimately forced them to drop the case because they had nothing.

twitter.content: @Timodc They indicted Russians they never expected to show up for trial. Most of them didn’t, but one Russian company hired US counsel , completely embarrassed Mueller‘s office, and ultimately forced them to drop the case because they had nothing.

quotedTweet.content: Quote: "Mueller’s family didn’t deserve the president’s grave dancing. None of Trump’s many enemies do. But Trump also didn’t deserve Russiagate. Nearly a decade after that phony scandal, our republic is still trying to recover."

parentTweet.content:
This is crazy. Trumps 1st endorser Jeff Sessions appointed Mueller!! He indicted 25 Russians. The report was so straightforward the GOP senate report echoed it. Then he retired and went back to private life. 

For this he deserves the president grave dancing on him? Trash.
